name: authentication-tracing
description: Use this skill when asked to trace authentication flows, analyze SessionId chains, investigate token reuse vs interactive MFA, or assess geographic anomalies in sign-ins. Triggers on keywords like "trace authentication", "trace back to interactive MFA", "SessionId analysis", "token reuse", "geographic anomaly", "impossible travel", or when investigating suspicious sign-in locations. This skill provides forensic analysis of Entra ID authentication chains to distinguish legitimate activity from...
